global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are centered in the ad, rendered in a lighter shade of orange.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Escape this weekend' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message reads 'Flexible booking options', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Claim reward' encourages user interaction.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexible booking options

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€29.99' is displayed in bold white text, positioned just above the call to action.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' appears at the top left corner in a simple, modern font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' is positioned at the top right corner, drawing attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, key elements include geometric shapes and a call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Escape this weekend, Flexible booking options, €29.99, Claim reward, CloudRoute, SALE
